title: Enter the Rodent 7: Not Before I’ve Had My Coffee
description: You’ve seen him kick. You’ve seen him bite. You’ve seen him run in his treadmill. He is Lang-Chao, Gerbil of Death.
quote: We’re samurai kung fu warlords from east of Pittsburgh. Our kung fu is better than your kung fu.
altHero: Lang-Chao, a gerbil in kung fu attire, wielding a Q-tip
alt1: someone watches in delight as Lang-Chao runs on a hamster wheel
alt4: sleepy Lang-Chao filling up a bowl of cereal
